name: Northwest Airlines
description: Northwest Airlines (NWA) was a major American airline that operated from its founding in 1926 until its merger with Delta Air Lines in 2010. Headquartered in Eagan, Minnesota, near Minneapolis–Saint Paul, the carrier grew to become one of the largest airlines in the world, serving an extensive domestic and international network. Known for its significant trans-Pacific operations, Northwest played a pivotal role in the development of the modern aviation industry. Following the 2008 acquisition by Delta, the Northwest brand was eventually retired as the two companies fully integrated their operations into a single global carrier.
